### render_prompt

>  render_prompt (name:str, **kwargs:Any)

*Load and format a markdown prompt template.*

Search order: 1. User-specified directory via config (for overrides) 2.
Bundled package templates via importlib.resources

Args: name: Template filename. \*\*kwargs: Additional context variables
for string formatting.

Returns: Rendered template content.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/prompts.py#L77"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### prompt_context

>  prompt_context ()

*Compute default formatting context for prompts.*

Returns a dict with keys: - lib: The library name from settings.ini (or
‘<lib_name>’ placeholder) - nbs_path: The notebooks directory (default
‘nbs’)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/prompts.py#L48"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### prompt_template_path

>  prompt_template_path (name:str)

*Locate a prompt template file (for user overrides only).*

Search order: 1. User-specified directory via NBMCP_CONFIG.prompt_dir
(if absolute and exists)

For bundled templates, use render_prompt() directly which uses
importlib.resources.

Args: name: Template filename (e.g., ‘workflow_philosophy.md’).

Returns: Path to the template file.

Raises: FileNotFoundError: If template cannot be found in user
directory.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/prompts.py#L38"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### get_bundled_template

>  get_bundled_template (name:str)

*Load a template from the bundled package resources.*

Uses importlib.resources which works in both installed packages and
notebooks.

### nbdev_advanced_patterns

>  nbdev_advanced_patterns ()

*Advanced nbdev patterns.*

``` python
print(nbdev_advanced_patterns()[:200])
```

    # nbdev Advanced Patterns

    ## Exports
    - 🚫 Do not define `__all__` anywhere. nbdev builds exports automatically.

    ## Package Structure
    - Top-level init: `nbs/00__init__.ipynb` → `#| default_exp _init__

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/prompts.py#L177"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### reuse_first_checklist

>  reuse_first_checklist ()

*Reuse-first checklist for package-hierarchy alignment.*

``` python
print(nbdev_main_patterns()[:200])
```

    # nbdev __main__ and Console Scripts

    ## Safe __main__ patterns
    1) Same notebook, separate cell:
    ```python
    #| export
    #| eval: false
    if __name__ == "__main__":
        import sys
        sys.exit(main())
    ```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/prompts.py#L189"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>
